title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF -  Update Available
scenario: When Notifications master toggle is OFF, pairing a device with lower firmware version incorrectly shows an update available notification
steps: Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
Turn OFF the Notifications master toggle.
Ensure the Poly App is running in the background on the mobile phone.
Pair a device whose firmware version is lower than the current version on the server (Cloud).
Observe the notification upon successful pairing.
expected: No notification should appear upon successful pairing.
